metadata.promise: Découvrez le secret magique d'un boulanger belge qui transforme chaque pâtisserie en cadeau d'amour, et vivez l'extraordinaire révélation que les plus beaux trésors se créent avec le cœur.
metadata.editorialPositioning: Un conte gourmand belge sur la transmission intergénérationnelle et la découverte magique que l'amour transforme l'ordinaire en extraordinaire.

dedication.text_template: Pour tous les secrets d'amour qui se partagent, un spéculoos à la fois.

page_1.text_template: Chaque samedi matin, {child_name} danse sur les pavés de Gand, la main dans celle de Mamie Rose. Timur le chat roux s'étire près de la vitrine. L'air chante le pain chaud et la cannelle, comme si toute la Grand-Place respirait la douceur.

page_2.text_template: Derrière sa vitrine en chêne patiné, Monsieur Claudio offre des trésors mystérieux. Au facteur fatigué : "Un pain au chocolat pour rallumer les étoiles." À la fillette timide : "Un spéculoos doré contre la peur." {child_name} observe ce ballet étrange. Quel secret merveilleux !

page_3.text_template: Dans le fournil doré, Monsieur Claudio révèle ses mystères. Ses mains caressent la pâte blonde. "Regarde, {child_name}. Ici, un souffle de beurre. Là, des cristaux de sucre belge. Et dans chaque geste... un souvenir qui transforme tout en magie."

page_4.text_template: Ce samedi-là, la boulangerie dort. "Fermé - À bientôt" murmure l'écriteau de bois. Les yeux de Mamie Rose se voilent. Soudain, {child_name} comprend : "Et si nous préparions quelque chose de merveilleux pour Monsieur Claudio ? Comme il fait pour tout le monde ?"

page_5.text_template: Dans la cuisine baignée d'or, {child_name} découvre le grand secret ! Avec Mamie Rose, chaque geste devient poésie. La farine vole, les rires perlent. {child_name} ajoute une framboise du jardin flamand - et comprend enfin : l'amour est l'ingrédient magique !

page_6.text_template: Monsieur Claudio revient, le sourire las mais tendre. {child_name} tend la pâtisserie dorée. Le boulanger croque, ferme les paupières... et son visage s'illumine comme les vitraux de Sainte-Bavo. "Tu as percé notre plus beau mystère, petit magicien !" Sous le pommier de Mamie, trois générations savourent cette révélation sucrée.

summary.text_template: {child_name} a découvert l'extraordinaire vérité : le secret du boulanger, c'est l'amour qui transforme chaque geste ordinaire en pure magie.

backCover.text_template: Une histoire belge gourmande où l'ordinaire devient extraordinaire, un spéculoos à la fois.

dedication.text_template: For all the secrets of love shared, one Belgian speculoos at a time.

page_1.text_template: Every Saturday morning, {child_name} dances across Ghent's cobblestones, fingers entwined with Grandma Rose's. Timur the ginger cat stretches by the window. The air sings of warm bread and Belgian cinnamon - as if the whole Grand Place breathes sweetness.

page_2.text_template: Behind weathered oak windows, Mr. Claudio offers mysterious treasures. To the weary postman: "Chocolate pastry to relight your stars." To the shy little girl: "Golden speculoos against fear." {child_name} watches this strange ballet. What wonderful secret dances here?

page_3.text_template: In the golden bakehouse, Mr. Claudio reveals his mysteries. Expert hands caress the blonde dough. "Look, {child_name}. Here, a whisper of butter. There, crystals of Belgian sugar. And in every touch... a memory that transforms everything into magic."

page_4.text_template: That Saturday, the bakery sleeps. "Closed - Until soon" whispers the wooden sign. Grandma Rose's eyes cloud with worry. Suddenly, {child_name} understands: "What if we prepared something wonderful for Mr. Claudio? Just like they do for everyone else?"

page_5.text_template: In the kitchen bathed in gold, {child_name} discovers the great secret! With Grandma Rose, every gesture becomes poetry. Flour dances, laughter sparkles. {child_name} adds a raspberry from the Flemish garden - and finally understands: love is the magic ingredient!

page_6.text_template: Mr. Claudio returns, smile tired but tender. {child_name} offers the golden pastry. The baker bites, closes eyes... and their face illuminates like Saint Bavo's stained glass. "You've uncovered our most beautiful mystery, little magician!" Under Grandma's apple tree, three generations savor this sweet revelation.

summary.text_template: {child_name} discovered the extraordinary truth: the baker's secret is the love that transforms every ordinary gesture into pure magic.

backCover.text_template: A delicious Belgian tale where ordinary becomes extraordinary, one speculoos at a time.

dedication.text_template: Voor alle liefdesgeheimen die worden gedeeld, één Belgische speculoos tegelijk.

page_1.text_template: Elke zaterdagochtend danst {child_name} over de keien van Gent, vingertjes verstengeld met die van Oma Rose. Timur de rode kater rekt zich uit bij het raam. De lucht zingt van warm brood en Belgische kaneel - alsof heel de Graslei zoetjes ademt.

page_2.text_template: Achter verouderde eiken ramen biedt Meneer Claudio mysterieuze schatten aan. Tegen de vermoeide postbode: "Chocoladegebak om je sterren weer aan te steken." Voor het verlegen meisje: "Gouden speculoos tegen de angst." {child_name} bekijkt dit vreemde ballet. Wat een prachtig geheim!

page_3.text_template: In de gouden bakkerij onthult Meneer Claudio zijn mysteries. Ervaren handen strelen het blonde deeg. "Kijk eens, {child_name}. Hier, een zuchtje boter. Daar, kristallen Belgische suiker. En in elke aanraking... een herinnering die alles in magie verandert."

page_4.text_template: Die zaterdag slaapt de bakkerij. "Gesloten - Tot gauw" fluistert het houten bordje. Oma Rose's ogen betrekken van zorgen. Plots begrijpt {child_name}: "Wat als wij iets prachts maken voor Meneer Claudio? Net zoals die doet voor iedereen?"

page_5.text_template: In de keuken gebaad in goud ontdekt {child_name} het grote geheim! Met Oma Rose wordt elk gebaar poëzie. Meel danst, gelach fonkelt. {child_name} voegt een framboos toe uit de Vlaamse tuin - en begrijpt eindelijk: liefde is het magische ingrediënt!

page_6.text_template: Meneer Claudio komt terug, glimlach moe maar teder. {child_name} biedt het gouden gebakje aan. De bakker bijt, sluit ogen... en het gezicht licht op als het glas-in-lood van Sint-Baafs. "Je hebt ons mooiste mysterie ontdekt, kleine tovenaar!" Onder Oma's appelboom proeven drie generaties deze zoete openbaring.

summary.text_template: {child_name} ontdekte de buitengewone waarheid: het geheim van de bakker is de liefde die elk gewoon gebaar in pure magie verandert.

backCover.text_template: Een heerlijk Belgisch verhaal waar gewoon buitengewoon wordt, één speculoos tegelijk.

style_rules: Premium watercolor and gouache technique with soft wet-on-wet blending and luminous glazes
Warm Belgian bakery palette: butter-yellow, terracotta, cream, golden brown, sage green accents
Golden morning light streaming through traditional Belgian windows with honey-colored warmth
Cinematic close-ups on flour-dusted hands, golden pastries, and intergenerational connections
Authentic Belgian architectural details: weathered brick houses, hand-laid cobblestones, wooden bakery fixtures
Soft focus backgrounds with detailed foreground emotional moments and premium artistic depth
No text, letters, signs, or readable labels within images - pure visual storytelling
visualBible.palette: warm honey-butter yellow, rich terracotta brick, cream white, golden amber brown, sage green, soft periwinkle blue, weathered brick red, hand-laid cobblestone grey
visualBible.lighting: golden hour morning light filtering through Belgian lace curtains, warm bakery glow from traditional ovens, honey-colored window lighting creating cinematic depth, dappled garden sunlight through apple leaves
compositionRules: Close-up emotional moments with detailed facial expressions showing wonder and connection
Wide establishing shots showcasing authentic Belgian architecture and cobblestone streets
Child-eye-level perspective for emotional connection and sense of discovery
Leading lines through cobblestones and traditional architectural elements
Generous negative space to enhance premium book quality and avoid visual clutter
Focus on hands, faces, and traditional Belgian foods as emotional and cultural anchors

identityRules: Child hero: 5-6 years old with warm chestnut brown eyes and tousled auburn hair with natural curls
Rosy apple cheeks and bright, expressive face showing genuine wonder and concentration throughout
Always wearing a hand-knitted sage green wool sweater with cream-colored collar details
Small childlike stature reaching approximately to adult's mid-waist height consistently
Expressive dark eyebrows and authentic childlike enthusiasm in all facial expressions
Progressively becomes flour-dusted from page 3 onwards showing hands-on participation in baking
heroBible.characterDesign: A warm, approachable 5-6 year old child with tousled auburn curls, bright chestnut brown eyes sparkling with curiosity and wonder, wearing a cozy hand-knitted sage green wool sweater with cream collar details. Rosy apple cheeks frame an expressive face that radiates genuine amazement, concentration, and joy throughout the magical baking discovery journey.
forbiddenDrift: No age progression - child remains consistently 5-6 years old throughout all story scenes
No hair color changes from tousled auburn with natural curls
No eye color changes from warm chestnut brown
No dramatic clothing changes beyond natural flour dusting progression from page 3
No height inconsistencies relative to grandmother and baker characters across pages
No facial feature drift - maintain consistent nose shape, mouth, eyebrow thickness and placement
No personality changes - maintain consistent wonder and enthusiasm expression

imageGeneration.negativePromptDefault: text, letters, words, signs, labels, logos, modern elements, plastic, harsh lighting, dark mood, scary elements, illness, hospitals, money, prices, cash registers, cars, commercial atmosphere, artificial staging, sterile environment

rules: All text must be external to generated images
No text, signs, or readable labels in image prompts
Hero character design must be consistent across all pages
All three locales must be semantically aligned
Gender-neutral language required for child hero in all locales
No use of hij/hem/zijn in Dutch, he/she/him/her in English, il/elle in French for child hero
Belgian cultural authenticity in visual and textual elements
Ordinary-to-extraordinary arc with transformational climax on page_5
Premium poetic language avoiding generic AI children's book phrasing

editorialScore.rationale: Strong emotional arc with clear progression from curiosity to understanding and sharing. Authentic Belgian cultural elements and meaningful intergenerational connection. Age-appropriate language with read-aloud appeal.

imageabilityScore.rationale: Highly visual scenes with clear actions, emotions, and settings. Premium watercolor style well-defined. Some abstract concepts like 'secrets' require careful visual interpretation but are supported by concrete actions.

heroConsistencyScore.rationale: Detailed hero bible with specific physical characteristics, consistent clothing, and clear appearance rules. Forbidden drift guidelines prevent character inconsistencies across pages.

localeCompletenessScore.rationale: All three locales complete with semantically aligned content. Gender-neutral language properly implemented. Some minor cultural adaptation opportunities in EN/NL locales could enhance local relevance.
